name: io.github.siriuslattice/stellarmcp
title: StellarMCP
description: MCP server giving AI agents access to Stellar blockchain data — 17 tools, multi-oracle prices (SDEX + Reflector), MCP-over-HTTP support, x402 micropayments settled on Stellar

environmentVariables.name: HORIZON_URL
environmentVariables.description: Stellar Horizon REST API base URL

environmentVariables.name: TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode: stdio for MCP clients, http for x402-gated REST, mcp-http for remote MCP over HTTP

environmentVariables.name: STELLAR_PAYEE_ADDRESS
environmentVariables.description: Stellar address that receives x402 payments (HTTP mode only)

environmentVariables.name: OZ_FACILITATOR_URL
environmentVariables.description: OpenZeppelin x402 facilitator URL (HTTP mode only)

environmentVariables.name: OZ_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenZeppelin facilitator API key (HTTP mode only)

tools.name: getAccount
tools.description: Get Stellar account details including balances, thresholds, and signers

tools.name: getTransactions
tools.description: Get recent transactions for a Stellar account

tools.name: getPayments
tools.description: Get recent payments for a Stellar account

tools.name: getOrderbook
tools.description: Get Stellar DEX orderbook for an asset pair with spread and midprice

tools.name: getTradeAggregations
tools.description: Get OHLC trade aggregation data for a Stellar DEX asset pair

tools.name: getAssetInfo
tools.description: Get metadata for a Stellar asset including supply, accounts, and flags

tools.name: getLedger
tools.description: Get details of a specific Stellar ledger by sequence number

tools.name: getEffects
tools.description: Get effects (balance changes, trades, trustlines) for a Stellar account

tools.name: getOffers
tools.description: Get open DEX offers for a Stellar account

tools.name: getOperations
tools.description: Get all operations for a Stellar account

tools.name: getLiquidityPools
tools.description: Get Stellar AMM liquidity pools, optionally filtered by account

tools.name: getClaimableBalances
tools.description: Get claimable balances filtered by claimant or asset

tools.name: getPrice
tools.description: Get current normalized price for any Stellar asset pair with multi-oracle aggregation (median + per-source attribution from SDEX and Reflector)

tools.name: getPriceHistory
tools.description: Get OHLC price history with VWAP for a Stellar asset pair

tools.name: getVWAP
tools.description: Get volume-weighted average price for a Stellar asset pair

tools.name: getSorobanTokenInfo
tools.description: Get SEP-41 Soroban token metadata (symbol, name, decimals) and optional balance for a Stellar account
